findings.issue: ZH adds parenthetical gloss '（大型机）' not present in JP source
findings.detail: JP: '汎用コンピュータ'. ZH: '通用计算机（大型机）'. The gloss is accurate but constitutes unsolicited addition.
findings.recommendation: Accept as helpful disambiguation unless strict no-addition policy applies.

findings.issue: EN surface and EN definition use different translations for 携帯情報端末
findings.detail: Surface EN: 'Personal Digital Assistant'. Definition EN body: 'portable information terminal'. Two different English renderings within the same entity.
findings.recommendation: Harmonize: either use 'Personal Digital Assistant (PDA)' throughout, or adopt 'Portable Information Terminal' throughout.

findings.issue: EN definition refers to 'tablet terminals' but the established surface EN is 'Tablet Device'
findings.detail: def EN: 'The "tablet terminals" and PCs (notebook type)...' vs surface of タブレット端末 = 'Tablet Device'
findings.recommendation: Replace 'tablet terminals' with 'Tablet Device' in this definition.

findings.issue: ZH translation of 「5つの役割」is inconsistent across the same section (11-02)
findings.detail: p394 section+figure: 五种作用; p395 section+table: 五大功能; p395 figure: 五种角色. Three different ZH renderings of identical JP concept within section 11-02.
findings.recommendation: Standardize to one ZH term throughout. Recommended: 五大功能 (most idiomatic for '5 functions/roles').

findings.issue: ZH section title uses 五种作用 but p395 section title uses 五大功能 for same JP phrase
findings.detail: Both pages carry section_number 11-02 with identical JP. ZH differs.
findings.recommendation: Harmonize p394 section title ZH to match p395 if 五大功能 is chosen.

findings.issue: EN figure caption uses 'The Five Roles of a Computer' vs section title 'Five Roles of a Computer'
findings.detail: Definite article 'The' added. Minor stylistic variation, not a semantic defect.

findings.issue: EN row[2] lists 'storage' for 記憶 but row[3] header uses 'Memory' for the same concept
findings.detail: In row[2] control definition: '(arithmetic operation, storage, input, output)' — uses 'storage'. Row[3] header EN: 'Memory'. Inconsistent within the same table.
findings.recommendation: Standardize: use 'memory' in row[2] parenthetical to match row[3] header term.

findings.issue: EN section title inconsistency for section 11-03 across pages 396 and 397
findings.detail: Both pages carry section 11-03 '演算と制御'. p396 EN: 'Arithmetic and Control'. p397 EN: 'Operation and Control'. Two different EN renderings of the same JP section title.
findings.recommendation: Standardize to one EN rendering. 'Arithmetic and Control' is preferred for IT context (演算 = arithmetic/computation); align p397 to match p396.

findings.issue: ZH translates 1クロック as '1时钟' which is a direct transliteration
findings.detail: Standard Chinese computing might prefer '1个时钟周期' but '1时钟' is common in JIS-influenced texts.
findings.recommendation: Accept unless style guide mandates full '时钟周期' form.

findings.issue: ZH 'USB 内存' for USBメモリ is a Japanism; more standard ZH would be 'U盘' or 'USB存储器'
findings.detail: JP: USBメモリ → ZH: 'USB 内存'. In standard mainland ZH computing context, 'U盘' (USB flash drive) is far more common.
findings.recommendation: Consider replacing 'USB 内存' with 'U盘' or 'USB闪存盘' for naturalness.

findings.issue: Table caption EN 'Main Auxiliary Storage Devices' risks confusion with 'main memory'
findings.detail: JP: 主な補助記憶装置. EN: 'Main Auxiliary Storage Devices'. The word 'Main' is ambiguous — could be misread as 'main/primary storage' devices rather than 'major/key' examples.
findings.recommendation: Reword to 'Key Auxiliary Storage Devices' or 'Common Auxiliary Storage Devices'.

summary: AUDIT COMPLETE. 54 entities across 10 pages (pp.392-401, section 11-01 to 11-04: Computer Types, 5 Roles, Arithmetic+Control, Memory). 3 MAJOR findings (all Lens C cross-entity consistency): (1) 携帯情報端末 EN surface says 'Personal Digital Assistant' but EN definition body says 'portable information terminal' (p393); (2) Section 11-02 ZH title 「5つの役割」 rendered three ways across pp.394-395 (五种作用 / 五大功能 / 五种角色); (3) Section 11-03 EN title 「演算と制御」 rendered 'Arithmetic and Control' (p396) vs 'Operation and Control' (p397). 5 MINOR findings: tablet terminal naming inconsistency (EN), 記憶/storage vs memory within same table (EN), ZH 五种作用 vs 五大功能 across pages, USB内存 Japanism (ZH), table caption 'Main Auxiliary Storage Devices' ambiguity (EN). 3 INFO findings. 0 glossary surface mismatches (25/26 terms found in glossary; ハードウェア not in glossary — acceptable, it is a chapter-level umbrella term). Field completeness: PASS. Encoding: PASS.
